channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer to meet family of murdered student Henry Nowak after hitting out at Musk amid political row
item.description: Starmer to meet family of murdered student Henry Nowak after hitting out at Musk amid political row

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Darren Jones told Mandelson he was ‘so sorry’ after sacking over Epstein ties
item.description: Darren Jones told Mandelson he was ‘so sorry’ after sacking over Epstein ties

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Keir Starmer hits out at Elon Musk for ‘trying to whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak’s murder
item.description: Keir Starmer hits out at Elon Musk for ‘trying to whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak’s murder

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer to meet Henry Nowak’s family this afternoon, No 10 says – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer to meet Henry Nowak’s family this afternoon, No 10 says – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Boris Johnson described Theresa May as a ‘giant yucca tree under whose shade everything dies’
item.description: Boris Johnson described Theresa May as a ‘giant yucca tree under whose shade everything dies’
